channel.title: The Akshat Protocol
channel.description: Recent content on The Akshat Protocol

item.title: The Akshat Protocol
item.description:
Hey! This is my first post.

The Akshat Protocol

From Imagination to Intelligent Systems.

Building AI-powered systems through code, automation, and engineering. Exploring machine intelligence, smart infrastructure, computer vision, and futuristic technology — one project at a time.

Not just creating projects. Creating systems with purpose.

item.title: About
item.description:
The Akshat Protocol

From Imagination to Intelligent Systems.

The Akshat Protocol is my personal innovation portfolio focused on Artificial Intelligence, IoT, Automation, Embedded Systems, and Smart Technology.

I am Akshat Bhatt, an AI developer and technology enthusiast passionate about building intelligent systems that combine software, hardware, and automation to solve real-world problems.

What started as curiosity through science experiments, electronics, coding, and problem-solving gradually evolved into developing complete working systems powered by AI, Machine Learning, Computer Vision, and IoT integration.

item.title: Projects
item.description: Things I've built — AI, IoT, Computer Vision & more
